envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Enterprise add-ons extend Enterprise plans (or are sold as bespoke extensions). Each add-on is governance-bound. Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Add-ons extend availability; they never relax governance.

items.name: SSO / SAML / SCIM
items.description: Enterprise SSO + SAML + SCIM provisioning. Integrates with enterprise IDP. Per-tenant secret isolation per ADR-0019 + ADR-0024.
items.human_readable_summary: SSO / SAML / SCIM. Enterprise IDP integration. Per-tenant secret isolation.
items.model_usage_notes: IDP integration is governance-bound. Secrets never exposed.
items.governance_notes: SSO does not change cross-tenant boundary.
items.billing_notes: addon_id: sso-saml-scim. Enterprise tier. Final pricing negotiated.

items.name: Custom Retention
items.description: Custom retention extension above lawful retention floor. Extends; never reduces.
items.human_readable_summary: Custom Retention. Extends retention above lawful floor.

items.name: Custom Connector
items.description: Custom connector adapter for enterprise-specific vendor systems. Per-connector RULE 21 research arc per ADR-0084.
items.human_readable_summary: Custom Connector. Enterprise-specific adapter. Per-connector RULE 21 research arc.
items.model_usage_notes: Custom connector follows ADR-0084 per-connector discipline.
items.governance_notes: Read-first by default; write-disabled by default; risky writes dual-control.
items.billing_notes: addon_id: custom-connector. Enterprise tier. Custom pricing.

items.name: Advanced DMW Policy
items.description: Advanced DMW policy add-on. Extends DMW Memory Governance pack with enterprise-specific policy.
items.human_readable_summary: Advanced DMW Policy. Enterprise-specific memory governance.
items.model_usage_notes: Baseline DMW safety unchanged. Advanced policy extends.
items.governance_notes: RULE 0 sovereignty absolute through this add-on.

items.name: Private Cloud / VPC
items.description: Private cloud / VPC deployment add-on per ADR-0018 deployment-target agnosticism.
items.model_usage_notes: Deployment-target agnosticism preserves Foundation substrate semantics.
items.governance_notes: Per ADR-0018 deployment posture. Foundation governance + audit + DMW unchanged.
items.billing_notes: addon_id: private-cloud-vpc. Enterprise tier. Custom pricing.

items.name: Regulated Deployment
items.description: Regulated industry deployment (e.g., sovereign cloud, FedRAMP-aligned posture) per ADR-0018 + ADR-0049.
items.human_readable_summary: Regulated Deployment. Sovereign / regulated industry posture. Never claim guaranteed compliance or regulator approval.
items.model_usage_notes: Regulated posture extends Foundation substrate; certification is the customer/regulator's responsibility.
items.billing_notes: addon_id: regulated-deployment. Enterprise tier. Custom pricing.

items.name: Dedicated Support
items.description: Dedicated support engineer / customer success management.
items.human_readable_summary: Dedicated Support. Named support engineer / CSM.
items.model_usage_notes: Dedicated support is a services extension.
items.governance_notes: Support operates inside tenant boundary; audit-traced.

items.name: SLA
items.description: Service-level agreement add-on with uptime + response-time + remediation commitments.
items.model_usage_notes: SLA commitments are operational; governance is unchanged.
items.governance_notes: SLA does not relax governance or audit discipline.
items.billing_notes: addon_id: sla. Enterprise tier. Custom terms.

items.name: DPA / MSA
items.description: Data processing agreement + master services agreement add-on for enterprises requiring explicit contracts.
items.human_readable_summary: DPA / MSA. Explicit data processing + master services contracts.
items.governance_notes: DPA / MSA extends contractual obligations; Foundation governance unchanged.

items.name: Premium Onboarding
items.description: Premium onboarding services for enterprise activation. Dandelion-aligned org-seeding.
items.human_readable_summary: Premium Onboarding. Enterprise activation services. Dandelion-aligned.
items.model_usage_notes: Onboarding services per Dandelion + Wave 2.1 role-depth.

items.name: Custom Evidence Workflows
items.description: Custom evidence-packaging workflows for regulator-ready enterprise.
items.human_readable_summary: Custom Evidence Workflows. Regulator-ready substrate. Never claim guaranteed compliance.
items.model_usage_notes: Evidence workflows extend the regulator-evidence pack.

items.name: Audit Export Expansion
items.description: Audit export expansion above per-plan inclusion. Baseline + legal window exports remain non-paywallable.
items.human_readable_summary: Audit Export Expansion. Adds export volume above plan inclusion.
items.model_usage_notes: Baseline + legal window exports never paywalled.

items.name: Security Review Package
items.description: Security review package for enterprises requiring formal security review documentation + posture statement.
items.human_readable_summary: Security Review Package. Documentation + posture statement. Never claim regulator approval.
items.model_usage_notes: Security review delivers documentation; certification is the customer's call.
